name: nova-engineering
description: A software engineering team delivering features from requirements through production deployment.

resources.name: Engineering Lead
resources.description: Owns the delivery roadmap, sets technical direction, and coordinates cross-functional priorities.

resources.name: Backend Engineer
resources.description: Builds and maintains server-side logic, APIs, and data models.

resources.name: Frontend Engineer
resources.description: Implements user interfaces, handles client-state, and ensures cross-browser compatibility.

resources.name: QA Engineer
resources.description: Designs test plans, runs regression suites, and tracks defects to closure.

resources.name: Feature Delivery
resources.description: End-to-end cycle from feature spec through production deployment.

resources.name: Plan
resources.description: Define requirements, break down tasks, and assign work for the sprint.

resources.name: Build
resources.description: Implement the feature across backend and frontend layers with unit test coverage.

resources.name: Code Review
resources.description: Review pull requests for correctness, style, and test coverage before merge.

resources.name: Deploy
resources.description: Merge to main, run CI, cut a release, and promote to production with observability checks.

resources.name: API Design
resources.description: Define contracts, schemas, and versioning strategy for new endpoints.

resources.name: UI Development
resources.description: Translate designs into responsive components and wire up API integrations.

resources.name: Test Planning
resources.description: Write test cases covering happy paths, edge cases, and regression scenarios.

resources.name: Bug Reporting
resources.description: Document defects with reproduction steps, severity, and affected builds.

resources.name: Sprint Planning
resources.description: Prioritize the backlog and commit team capacity for the upcoming sprint.
